commentary_text: fullish on middle and leg. A bit of shape away and Salt comes forward to push it to mid on
back of a length outside off and this moves away late. Salt goes wafting at it without much foot movement and is beaten on the outside
full and wide outside off. Salt throws his hands at it and slices it over point. The ball plugs in the outfield and Henry, running around from deep backward point, cuts it off

a direct hit and Kohli might have been walking back for a golden duck! Back of a length on off. Kohli tips it to point and calls for the single. Gets sent back from half-way and Veer's throw is just off the mark. Early reprieve for Kohli!
Full on middle and off. Stops a little in the surface and Kohli is early on his lofted stroke. Just enough legs to clear Dube at mid on, though
length ball pushed across the batter outside off. Kohli goes chasing after it and only connects with fresh air
back of a length outside off. Salt gets up on his toes and runs it down to short third, where Khaleel misfields and ends up conceding a single
back of a length just outside off. Kohli dabs it to short third and Khaleel misfields yet again. No extra runs conceded this time, though
Fullish outside off and this leaves the batter a touch. Salt throws his hands at it and slices it down to deep backward point
Marginally short outside off. Kohli stands up tall and whips a pull towards deep square, where Noor sprawls to his left and saves two
hard length outside off. Kohli charges down the track before shanking it to mid on
length ball outside off. Salt plants his front foot and drills it straight to mid off
banged in short outside off and this comes off a touch sluggishly. Kohli tugs it enough to mid wicket's right and settles for a single
back of a length outside off. Salt tries the fight the angle away from him and slices it towards deep backward point

goes straight up, and Dube puts it down! Kohli breathes a sigh of relief! Hard length just outside off. Kohli has a hack at it and shanks it badly. Dube runs back from mid on, gets under it but the ball hits his hands and then his chest. Not a moment Dube will want to look back on again!
length ball shaping into the pads. Kohli has another swipe at it and seems to miss, with the ball rolling off the pad behind square
off-pace on a back of a length outside off. Salt waits for it and slaps it to mid off before scampering across to the other end
length ball slanted across the batter outside off. Kohli has a wild swish at it and misses the ball by a fair distance. An un-Kohli-esque shot
over the top but this plugs too! Full just outside off. Salt gets under it and muscles it over mid on. The ball just stops in the surface after pitching and Dube can retrieve it!
pick the bones out of that one! And it is a no-look six to boot. On a length just outside off. Kohli plants his front foot and whips it over mid wicket!
full just outside off. Kohli plants his front foot again and scuffs it over the bowler's head. Back for a brace
dug in and following the batter outside leg. Kohli, having advanced, short-arm-jabs it behind square for a couple of runs
Full just outside off. Kohli marches down the track, shows the full face of the bat and cracks it back past the bowler!
back of a length on off. Kohli drops it into the mid wicket region and keeps strike
back of a length outside off. Kohli skips down the track and shanks it on the bounce to mid off. That seemed to stick in the surface too
Kohli continues on his merry way! Length ball just outside off. Kohli opens up his front hip and smears it over mid wicket!

bashed in short, and Kohli bites the dust! Dube with a bit of redemption! A little outside off. Kohli advances and tries to fetch it from outside the line. Gets a little under it and miscues it badly. Dube, stationed at long on, runs in and does the rest, despite the close proximity of Noor, who had run towards Dube from mid wicket. Kamboj with the breakthrough, and there is stunned silence at the Chinnaswamy!
back of a length just outside off. Padikkal has a stab at it and jams it off the inside edge into his pads. Rolls away for a single into the off side
nicked and just past a diving Samson! That flew off the bat. On a back of a length, honing into off. Salt wafts at it and gets a thick enough outside edge to beat the keeper to his right!
hard length, nipping into off. Salt, cramped for room, jams it into the cover region
slower ball on a length just outside leg. Salt too early into it and heaves it behind square. Not enough juice on the stroke, though, and cut off quite easily
shortish outside off. Salt gets up on his toes and jabs it towards extra cover
back of a length on off. Salt goes deep into his crease before punching it to mid on. Another easy single
length ball hung up outside off. Padikkal throws the kitchen sink at it but misses
first run for Padikkal off Khaleel. Back of a length outside off. Padikkal stays back and scuffs it towards sweeper cover
shot! Strong way to end the powerplay! Half-tracker outside off. Salt sits back, picks the length early and belts it to mid on's right!
shortish outside off. Padikkal gets on top of the bounce and jabs it towards deep point. A bit of hesitation on the second and Padikkal has to scramble to return to the bowler's end
shortish outside off and this sits up too. Salt hammers it but straight to extra cover. He will feel he missed out there
banged in short outside off and this sails past the batter. Salt lets it go and the umpire calls it a wide on height
Marginally short on middle and leg. Salt swivels inside the line and muscles it just over the deep backward square leg fence!
back of a length on off. Salt punches it to extra cover, where Ghosh, on as a sub, misfields and ends up conceding an extra run
Leg-cutter but way too short. Sits up on middle and off and Salt obliterates it to deep mid wicket's right!
hard length just outside off. Salt uses the pace and runs it down to deep third
zipped in very full just outside leg. Salt swings so hard at it that he ends up on the deck. Misses his stroke, with the ball pinging into his pad
googly on a back of a length just outside off. Salt chops it behind point and gets Padikkal on strike
length ball on middle and off. Padikkal goes back and knocks it to long on
Googly tossed up into the slot outside off. Salt gets down on one knee early and clobbers it over deep mid wicket!
shorter outside off. Salt waits on it before cutting it towards sweeper cover
darted in on a length on middle and leg. Padikkal tucks it off his pads towards deep backward square leg
short on leg. Padikkal looks for the pull but is a tad rushed on it. Cloths it towards deep backward square leg
full and wide outside off. Salt moves across his stumps and drills it towards mid off, who dives to his left and gets something behind it. Mhatre the fielder
short and wide outside off. Salt reaches out for it and slaps it towards sweeper cover
length outside off. Padikkal comes forward and chips it over extra cover. Back for another brace
Length ball on middle and leg. Padikkal pre-empts the line, walks across his stumps and helps it over short fine leg!
fuller just outside off. Padikkal has a big swing at it and slices it down to deep third. Keeps strike too
angled in full on middle and off. Padikkal tips it to extra cover and sets off for a single, only to be sent back by his partner. Sent back in time, though
leg-spinner on a length on off. Padikkal backs away before prodding it towards extra cover. Wants the single again but Salt is not as interested
back of a length outside off and this fizzes through. Padikkal shapes for the cut but is beaten by the extra skid
back of a length on middle and leg. Padikkal tucks it off his pads towards deep backward square leg
length ball on the pads. Salt hangs back and works it towards deep mid wicket
fired in full just down leg. Padikkal brings out the sweep and nudges it past short fine. Kamboj gives chase and keeps it to two
slow, short and wide outside off. Salt jumps up onto his toes and tugs it towards extra cover
well, this is almost a wide but on the other side. Full toss sliding down leg and Salt somehow chalks it behind square towards short fine. He will feel he missed out
back of a length outside off. Padikkal goes back and across before tapping it towards backward point

Dube does the trick! Inspired bowling change, and Salt perishes! This is banged into the track outside off. Seems like the slower variant and it comes off very sluggishly. Salt has a wild swipe at it and shanks it a mile up. Noor runs in from deep square and snaffles up the chance. Timely breakthrough for CSK!
back of a length just outside off. Patidar gets up on his toes and pats it to long on to open his account
Not the greatest ball Dube will ever bowl. Too much width on offer and Padikkal slashes it over short third!
Floated up full outside off. Patidar comes forward and takes on the long boundary, creaming it over sweeper cover!
fired in on a length on middle and off. Patidar drops it into the off side and picks up a run
oh, send an airplane to fetch that back! Given a bit of air on middle and leg. Padikkal dances down the track and launches it a mile over long on!
googly on a length on middle and leg. Spins in and beats Padikkal on the inside. Rolls off the back leg towards short third
googly on a full length on middle. Patidar pushes it to long off
back of a length outside off. Padikkal stays back and cuts it towards deep backward point
back of a length outside off. Padikkal gets on top of the bounce and punches it towards sweeper cover
length ball hung up wide outside off. Padikkal lets it go and sees the umpire indulge in some exercise
Banged half-way down and this gets up to near the helmet. Patidar rushed on it and he miscues it off the bottom half of the way. Gets just enough to clear a leaping Noor at deep backward square leg!
length ball on middle and leg. Eased out to deep mid wicket
This is a slower ball and this lands right in the slot outside off. Padikkal hares down the track and smokes it over wide long off!
four more! Dube being torn apart this over! Padikkal knows this is going to be wide, and that it is going to be shortish too. He goes back and across before gliding it past backward point!
Right in the slot just outside off. Padikkal loads up, gets his front foot out of the way and bludgeons it back past the bowler!
This is effortless batting. Slot ball outside off. Patidar goes through the line and just bunts it over mid off!
slower bumper on off. Patidar hangs back before hacking it to deep mid wicket
Back of a length outside off. Padikkal reaches out for it and slaps it flat towards extra cover. Gaikwad lunges to to his right but cannot make a tough chance stick!

dug into the track on leg. Padikkal gets under it and the square leg umpire calls it a wide on height. But hang on. CSK have reviewed it. And Ball Tracking reckons the ball is 0.01m under the head. Wide call overturned
short, wide and this is too easy! Padikkal has the freedom of the Chinnaswamy to work with and he thunders it over extra cover!
another short ball outside off. Rushes onto Padikkal and he cloths his pull to long on. , though - and this has been an amazing knock after a tricky teething period!

leg stump out of the ground, and Overton provides a bit of respite to CSK! Yorker speared in on leg stump. Padikkal walks across and tries to be too funky. Looks for the scoop but gets across far too much to access the ball. Misses it and sees his leg stump flat on the ground soon after. Overton is pumped, but Padikkal has done his job too through these middle overs!
zipped in full on middle and leg. David plays with the angle and tucks it to mid wicket
Back of a length in the channel and this skips through. Bowled at 148.6kph and David, swishing at it, is beaten for pace
slanted in full on the stumps. David pokes it back to the bowler, who gets his boot in the way. That was bowled at 145.4kph
length ball hung up wide outside off. David throws his hands at it and flays it on the bounce to sweeper cover
off-pace on a back of a length on off. Patidar too early into the pull and the ball bobbles off the back thigh behind point
hard length on the stumps. Patidar gives himself room and punches it uppishly towards sweeper cover
shortish outside off. David winds up and hoicks it towards deep backward square leg
Low full toss outside off. Patidar peels the outer cover off the ball and carves it over extra cover!

slower bumper outside off. Patidar tries to force it through the off side but only swishes at thin air. Patidar asks his partner whether it is worth the review, and This could be touch-and-go. Had a bit of a loopy trajectory. Ball Tracking comes up.

big, big lbw shout but not given! CSK review now! Excellent yorker, zoning into off stump. Patidar has a swing across the line and seems to miss, with the ball later kissing the back leg. Was he struck outside off and was it going beyond the stumps with the angle? Well, nothing doing on either of those counts because
Slower ball on a back of a length outside off. Patidar holds his swing and then slices it over backward point!
Khaleel dishes out another length ball into Patidar's wheelhouse, and he gets met. Patidar gets his front foot out of the way and wallops it over deep mid wicket!
leg-spinner on a full length on middle and leg. David comes forward and drives it towards deep extra cover
back of a length just outside off. Patidar shapes for the reverse and misses. Samson fumbles too and RCB pinch a bye
Googly dropped short outside off. David sits deep in his crease and forehands it over long off!
David's party has well and truly begun now! This is another feeble attempt at a hard length delivery. Sits up on middle and leg and David dismisses it over deep mid wicket!
David is on a rampage now, and this crowd is loving it! Another half-tracker outside off. David has all the time in the world to line it up and slap it over deep cover!
shortish just outside off. David hangs back and jabs it towards sweeper cover
Kamboj greeted with a boundary! Low full toss laced with width. David throws the plumbing at it and pummels it past extra cover!

zipped in full on leg stump. Right in the slot and Kamboj is lucky he does not have to fetch this back from Cubbon Park. David misses his swish and gets rapped on the pad. David livid with himself too
into the blockhole outside off. David cannot get under it and squeezes it past extra cover for a couple of runs

finally nails the wide yorker. David swings at it with all his might and misses. But hang on, he thinks this should be a wide. Did not seem so in real-time but why not have a look. David has walked a shade across his stumps and the ball is well inside the tramlines. RCB lose a review!
full toss on a Free hit and of course David takes full toll! Proper buffet ball outside off and David helps himself to a thump over mid on!

Kamboj outwits David, and the stumps have been shattered again! Searing yorker on leg. David pre-empts another wide delivery and walks across his stumps. Too far to then make contact and his leg stump is pegged back. But there is a reprieve for David because
into the blockhole outside off. David cannot get under this and scuffs it out to long off
Slot ball outside leg. David can pick his spot and he plunders it over the long leg fence!
low full toss outside off. David has a wild swipe at it and squirts it off the inside edge past short fine leg. Back for a brace
when it is going your way, it all goes your way! Banged in short just outside off. David rushed on the pull and the ball flies off the top edge over the keeper!
a 21-ball fifty for Tim David, and the Chinnaswamy erupts! A lot of RCB fans will end up with sore throats tonight, if David keeps this going. Full outside off and David pumps it over mid on!
the sixes keep getting bigger and bigger! Right in the slot outside off. David winds up and clobbers the living daylights out of this. Clean over the sightscreen!
onto the roof, and onto the metro station! Or somewhere in the near vicinity! Half-way down outside off. David rubs his eyes in disbelief before clattering it an absolute mile over deep mid wicket!
full, wide and into the stands it flies! This is like a video game now. Too much width on offer and Patidar scythes it over deep point!
high full toss outside off. Patidar tries to hit it too hard and shanks it back to the bowler
top yorker outside off. Patidar jams down on it and digs it out towards deep point
full and wide. David throws his hands at it and drills it out towards sweeper cover
another top wide yorker. Patidar cannot do much with it apart from clinking it off the toe-end towards sweeper cover

Sarfaraz loses it in the lights, and David has turbocharged RCB to 250! Full on the pads. David walks down the track and flicks it to deep mid wicket. Sarfaraz does not know where the ball is, and it bobbles past him and into the fence!
